description_long: This ornate vase features a tall, slender neck and a bulbous body, adorned with two sculpted handles shaped like stylized figures or draped forms on either side. The main body is finished in a deep cobalt blue, with intricate gold filigree and scrollwork framing a central panel that displays a hand-painted bouquet of colorful flowers. The neck and handles are glazed in a creamy, light tan color that transitions smoothly into the blue body, giving the vase a luxurious, antique appearance. The base is circular and slightly flared, providing stability. The decorative motifs and the sculpted handles suggest a late 19th or early 20th-century European influence, possibly Art Nouveau. The vase's surface is glossy and smooth, with fine detailing in both the painted and sculpted elements.
description: A tall, ornate vase with sculpted handles, deep blue and gold filigree, and a central floral painting. The surface is glossy and finely detailed, evoking an antique European style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted handles and a gold geometric motif on the blue body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one sculpted handle and partial gold scrollwork, with less floral detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central floral painting framed by gold filigree and both sculpted handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other handle and more of the gold scrollwork, but no floral panel.
